title: Taxi Perković | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Perković: platform meet-and-greet at the main railway station serving Šibenik, with onward transfers to Šibenik, Vodice, Krka and beyond.
keywords: taxi perkovic, perkovic taxi, perkovic train station taxi, perkovic railway station transfer, perkovic to sibenik, perkovic to krka

schema.name: Taxi Perković
schema.description: Private taxi meeting trains at Perković, the main railway station serving the Šibenik area, with onward transfers to Šibenik, Vodice, Krka, Drniš, Knin and Split Airport.

mainEntity.name: Where do you meet me at Perković station?

acceptedAnswer.text: On the platform, or by the station exit if you prefer. I will have your name ready and help with your bags so you can walk straight to the car.

mainEntity.name: What if my train to Perković is late?

acceptedAnswer.text: I track your train and adjust the pickup to match, at no extra charge, so I am there whenever it actually arrives.

mainEntity.name: Is there a taxi rank at Perković?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, there is no rank at the station, so it is best to book ahead. Send me your train time and destination and I will be waiting when you step off.
